metadata.title: Image in Editor
metadata.description: View Images, Transclusions, iFrames and PDF Files within the Editor without a necessity to switch to Preview.

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn off this option if you want to stop rendering images in the editor source mode. Disabling requires vault reload.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果你想在编辑器源代码模式下停止渲染图片，请关闭此选项。禁用需要重启ob库。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn on this option if you want Image files (jpeg, jpg, png, gif, svg, bmp, webp) to be rendered in Editor")
regex.target: .setDesc("开启此选项以在编辑器中渲染图像文件（jpeg, jpg, png, gif, svg, bmp, webp）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn on this option if you want transclusions to be rendered in Editor. Once this is enabled, you will have custom options for transclusions below.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果希望在编辑器中渲染转包含内容，请打开此选项。启用后，您将在下方看到自定义的嵌入内容选项。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn on this option if you want also PDF files to be rendered in Editor")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果希望也在编辑器中渲染PDF文件，请打开此选项")

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn on this option if you want iframes to be rendered in Editor")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果你想在编辑器中渲染iframe，请打开此选项。")

regex.source:
.setDesc(`
                Turn on this option if you want drawings to be rendered in Editor.
                You need to have "Excalidraw" plugin installed so that this
                option works.
                `)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`
                如果你希望在编辑器中渲染excalidraw绘图，请打开此选项.
                此选项要求必须安装Excalidraw插件`)

regex.source:
.setDesc(`
                Turn on this option if you want outlook MSG Files to be rendered in Editor. 
                You need to have "MSG Handler" plugin installed so that
                this option works
                `)
regex.target:
.setDesc(`
                如果你希望在编辑器中渲染outlook MSG文件，请打开此选项. 
                此选项要求必须安装MSG Handler插件
                `)

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn on if you want to trigger preview when you hover on internal links within the rendered transclusion")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果你想在悬停于渲染的转包含内容内的内部链接时触发预览，请打开此选项。")

regex.source:
x.innerHTML=`

The plugin will add image preview within the "Source Mode" of New Editor. In case you have Live Preview enabled, the plugin will automatically detect this and won't render additionally to avoid duplication.
regex.target:
x.innerHTML=`

该插件将在新编辑器的“源码模式”中添加图片预览功能。如果你启用了实时预览，插件会自动检测到这一点，并不会重复渲染。
